name: Westag & Getalit AG
summary: Westag & Getalit AG manufactures and sells wooden products for interior finishing and building construction. The company offers wooden doors, frames, kitchen worktops, window sills, laminates, direct coatings, coated plywood panels, solid surface materials, formworks, industrial panels, and vehicle panels. It distributes its products worldwide. The company was founded in 1901 and is based in Rheda-Wiedenbr√É¬ºck, Germany. Westag & Getalit AG is a subsidiary of Broadview Industries AG.
